concerns.text: Task T025 implements a 'Permutation Test' as per the plan, but the spec (FR-005) explicitly mandates the 'Corrected Resampled t-test (Nadeau & Bengio)' for 20 ≤ N < 100. There is no task covering the implementation of the spec-mandated t-test, creating a gap where the implementation cannot satisfy the functional requirement FR-005 as written.

FR-005 requires a sensitivity analysis sweeping cutoffs over {0.01, 0.05, 0.1} specifically in the context of the Corrected Resampled t-test. T025 implements this analysis for the Permutation Test. No task exists to implement the sensitivity analysis for the t-test required by FR-005, leaving the spec requirement unmet.

SC-002 defines the success criterion as measuring significance via the Corrected Resampled t-test. Since T025 implements the Permutation Test instead, and no task covers the t-test implementation, the project cannot satisfy SC-002 as defined in the spec.
